# Completion.ResolveHasMore method

Resolves the `hasMore` truncation hint, treating an absent (or non-`true`) value as `false`. (§19.4, R-19.4-i)

```csharp
public static bool ResolveHasMore(bool? hasMore)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| hasMore | The wire `hasMore` value (nullable). |

## Return Value

`true` only when *hasMore* is explicitly `true`.
